en: Pleasure to meet you. Oh, yeah, you too. Wow. Man, this is freaky.
He looks just, just like you did when I met you.
ko: 그가 네가 처음 만났을 때 모습과 똑같아.

en: Wasn't exactly a health club you were running there, Sam.
ko: 그곳은 정확히 건강 클럽은 아니었잖아, 샘.

en: This is strange, I gotta tell you. See, I didn't, I didn't know he had a brother.
Frasier, I don't mind telling you.
ko: 프레이저, 너와 맥주 매니아들과 재치 있는 대화를 나누는 동안

en: I'm a little offended that in all the time you spent swapping bon mots with a beer nut set,
ko: 프레이저, 너와 맥주 매니아들과 재치 있는 대화를 나누는 동안

en: you never once mentioned you had a brother? No, you know, the truth is, I bet he said something.
It's just that when Frasier gets going, you kind of have to tune him out.
ko: 프레이저가 말을 시작하면, 너는 그를 좀 무시해야 해.

en: A good slogan for his radio show. Dr. Frasier Crane, when he gets going, you have to tune him out.
ko: 프레이저 크레인 박사, 그가 말을 시작하면 너는 그를 무시해야 해.

en: Hey, what did he tell you about me, Sam? The father, the old cop.
ko: 이봐, 샘, 나에 대해 뭐라고 했어?

en: Uh, he told me you were dead. Dead?
ko: 그는 나한테 네가 죽었다고 했어. 죽었다고?

en: Well, we had had an argument. He called me a stuffed shirt and hung up on me, I was mad.
